case_title: DINTCHO, STANLEY DR. VS BRITTAIN CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DINTCHO, STANLEY DR. AS TO DEFENDANT BRITTAIN CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRITTAIN CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DINTCHO, STANLEY DR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRITTAIN CORP. DEFT BRITTA LEE COX VOLUNTARILY SUBMITTED HERSELF TO THE COURT'S JURISDICTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
